title: Sometimes…
excerpt: As much as I love traveling, there is nothing quite like being home. Jack got sick on the vacation portion of our Florida trip (argh!) but seems to be close to being 100% a week later. Sometimes it's weird, but…
body: As much as I love traveling, there is nothing quite like being home. Jack got sick on the vacation portion of our Florida trip (argh!) but seems to be close to being 100% a week later. Sometimes it's weird, but I do have to remind myself to just breathe. Doing the best I can to keep up with it all, and just grateful to have such an awesome support group and fangerines that are amazing. Made a little video while at Kara's and you can see it here.
